name: Hope Horn I
description:
A hunting horn made specifically
for the expedition. Its tunes
produce a variety of effects.

name: Hope Horn II
description:
A hunting horn made specifically
for the expedition. Its tunes
produce a variety of effects.

name: Hope Horn III
description:
A hunting horn made specifically
for the expedition. Its tunes
produce a variety of effects.

name: Hope Horn IV
description:
A hunting horn made specifically
for the expedition. Its tunes
produce a variety of effects.

name: Hope Horn V
description:
A hunting horn made specifically
for the expedition. Its tunes
produce a variety of effects.

name: Bone Horn I
description:
A hunting horn designed for
novices, but popular with
many hunters due to its solid
performance.

name: Bone Horn II
description:
A hunting horn designed for
novices, but popular with many
hunters due to its solid
performance.

name: Bone Horn III
description:
A hunting horn designed for
novices, but popular with
many hunters due to its solid
performance.

name: Bone Horn IV
description:
A hunting horn designed for
novices, but popular with
many hunters due to its solid
performance.

name: Hardened Bone Horn
description:
Not only does this upgraded Bone
Horn go bigger on the wham factor,
but it's easier to wield, too.

name: Metal Bagpipe I
description:
A metal hunting horn that delivers
clear, sonorous tones and inspires
courage in all who hear it.

name: Metal Bagpipe II
description:
A metal hunting horn that delivers
clear, sonorous tones and inspires
courage in all who hear it.

name: Metal Bagpipe III
description:
A metal hunting horn that delivers
clear, sonorous tones and inspires
courage in all who hear it.

name: Great Bagpipe
description:
The precious ores in this upgraded
Metal Bagpipe richen its tones,
igniting the heart of every hunter.

name: War Bongo I
description:
A Congalala drum and fife with a
rousing timbre that reminds one of
happy tavern gatherings.

name: War Bongo II
description:
A Congalala drum and fife with a
rousing timbre that reminds one of
happy tavern gatherings.

name: War Conga
description:
An upgraded War Bongo.
Without missing a beat, it can end
the beating of foes' hearts.

name: Balahara Horn I
description:
A Balahara hunting horn that
produces sound by rotating its bell
against an internal claw.

name: Balahara Horn II
description:
A Balahara hunting horn that
produces sound by rotating its bell
against an internal claw.

name: Balahara Horn III
description:
A Balahara hunting horn that
produces sound by rotating its bell
against an internal claw.

name: Balahara Horn IV
description:
A Balahara hunting horn that
produces sound by rotating its bell
against an internal claw.

name: Sandsea Ghantisil
description:
An enhanced Balahara Horn. Its
hard tones echo across the sands,
sending all creatures into a panic.

name: Dosha Farsounder I
description:
A Doshaguma drum and fife that
asserts dominance and brutality
on all within hearing distance.

name: Dosha Farsounder II
description:
A Doshaguma drum and fife that
asserts dominance and brutality
on all within hearing distance.

name: Dosha Farsounder III
description:
A Doshaguma drum and fife that
asserts dominance and brutality
on all within hearing distance.

name: Rey Perun I
description:
A hunting horn imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its anthems
announce the coming of a lord,
and invoke fear.

name: Rey Perun II
description:
A hunting horn imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its anthems
announce the coming of a lord,
and invoke fear.

name: Rey Perun III
description:
A hunting horn imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its anthems
announce the coming of a lord,
and invoke fear.

name: Perun Clairhorn
description:
An upgraded Rey Perun. May it
shake the world far and wide to
demonstrate its master's power
and authority.

name: Ajara Reverberator I
description:
An Ajarakan hunting horn that
shakes the skies with searing
vibrations, kindling the spirits
of listeners.

name: Ajara Reverberator II
description:
An Ajarakan hunting horn that
shakes the skies with searing
vibrations, kindling the spirits
of listeners.

name: Ajara-Jivaka
description:
An Ajara Reverberator by its
true name. Its player needs
no words to inspire armies
ten thousand strong.

name: Dosha Grudgesounder I
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma hunting
horn. To its defiers it shows no
mercy, clamorously returning them
to nature.

name: Dosha Grudgesounder II
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma hunting
horn. To its defiers it shows no
mercy, clamorously returning them
to nature.

name: Grudgesounder Urga
description:
An upgraded Dosha Grudgesounder.
Its destructive impulses transform
wielders into violence incarnate.

name: Albirath Feroce I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos hunting
horn. Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: Albirath Feroce II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos hunting
horn. Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: G. Rathalos Feroce
description:
An upgraded Albirath Feroce.
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Jin Dhaang I
description:
A Jin Dahaad hunting horn.
The evenly arranged materials
produce a cold, solemn timbre.

name: Precipice Kovira
description:
An upgraded Jin Dhaang.
Its chilling tones freeze the air
and announce an eternal winter.

name: Nihil Chord I
description:
A Xu Wu string instrument that
produces a timbre so lovely and
eldritch that it transcends music.

name: Nihil Chord II
description:
A Xu Wu string instrument that
produces a timbre so lovely and
eldritch that it transcends music.

name: Kae-Jin's Lament
description:
An upgraded Nihil Chord—
no mere instrument, but an
impostor waiting to devour
those it enchants.

name: G. Veldian Sibilus I
description:
A hunting horn made from
Guardian materials. Its song
liberates the heart and
fortifies one's will.

name: G. Veldian Sibilus II
description:
A hunting horn made from
Guardian materials. Its song
liberates the heart and
fortifies one's will.

name: G. Resounding Galahad
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Sibilus.
It echoes finality into the abyss,
mourning the imprisoned souls.

name: Kut-Ku's Song I
description:
Who knew Yian Kut-Ku possessed
a secret song as strange and
stirring as this hunting horn's?

name: Kut-Ku's Song II
description:
Who knew Yian Kut-Ku possessed
a secret song as strange and
stirring as this hunting horn's?

name: Kut-Ku Cantabile
description:
The upgraded form of Kut-Ku's
Song. Its odd tones and fiery
outbursts are the talk of both
field and town.

name: Poisoned Capri I
description:
A hunting horn made from
Gypceros parts; modeled after
its unique beak and crest.

name: Poisoned Capri II
description:
A hunting horn made from
Gypceros parts; modeled after
its unique beak and crest.

name: Crazed Melody
description:
An upgraded Poisoned Capri that
orchestrates its prey's descent
into death with a hollow gaze.

name: Valkyrie Chordmaker I
description:
A Rathian hunting horn...
or is it a bell...maybe a fife?
The designer clearly had
a lot in mind.

name: Valkyrie Chordmaker II
description:
A Rathian hunting horn...
or is it a bell...maybe a fife?
The designer clearly had
a lot in mind.

name: Queen Chordmaker
description:
An upgraded Valkyrie Chordmaker.
Its dulcet, regal song evokes the
new life of spring.

name: Deafening Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath
hunting horn. Only one able
to tame its brutality through
reason can wield it.

name: Fulgurhowl Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Deafening Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason
and will destroy an overeager
wielder.

name: Vadya Muse I
description:
A hunting horn forged from
Seregios claws. The melody it
creates drives its victims mad.

name: Allysyl Muse
description:
The spirit of rebellion
lives on in the enhanced
form of the Vadya Muse.

name: Flame Feroce I
description:
A hunting horn that joins
Rathalos bone and plating to
a wing membrane to produce
a fascinating sound.

name: Rathalos Feroce
description:
The Flame Feroce's enhanced form—
a polished instrument that heralds
the victory of a future king.

name: Kummerklang I
description:
A demonic Gore Magala hunting
horn. It's said that a single blow
would spell destruction for all
in sight.

name: Gramklang
description:
The Kummerklang's enhanced
form. Its strains rid the world
of hope and despair alike,
leaving nothing.

name: Veldian Sibilus I
description:
An Arkveld hunting horn. This
treasure was heaven's gift to
a knight who survived many
ordeals.

name: Sonic Horn I
description:
The faint lamentations of queens
turned into insects can be heard
in this Vespoid horn's timbre.

name: Sonic Horn II
description:
The faint lamentations of queens
turned into insects can be heard
in this Vespoid horn's timbre.

name: Sonic Horn III
description:
The faint lamentations of queens
turned into insects can be heard
in this Vespoid horn's timbre.

name: Sonic Horn IV
description:
The faint lamentations of queens
turned into insects can be heard
in this Vespoid horn's timbre.

name: Glass Royale
description:
Now deeper and richer in tone,
this Vespoid hunting horn plays
a paean to the lost queens.

name: Artian Sounder I
description:
A device assembled from unearthed
fragments. Intriguingly, it features
a complex amplifying mechanism.

name: Artian Sounder II
description:
A device assembled from unearthed
fragments. Intriguingly, it features
a complex amplifying mechanism.

name: Omiltika
description:
An ancient device with latent
potential. At full bellow, it
sings of the civilization it lost.

name: Esperanza Horn
description:
A fully field-tested Hope Horn.
Its inspiring tones restore courage
and destroy all despair.

name: Farsounder Honga
description:
An upgraded Dosha Farsounder,
now just a savage roar that
destroys courage and demands
surrender.

name: Resounding Galahad
description:
An upgraded Veldian Sibilus.
Ever a servant of the people,
its knight was sainted and
became legend.

name: Zoh Gariel I
description:
A Zoh Shia hunting horn with
a resounding judgment cry that
beckons in the second coming.

name: Blazing Gariel
description:
Gariel harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest judgment,
may the melody of this horn
proclaim the cessation of all.

name: Poetic Bell I
description:
An elegant bell left by a
famous military strategist.
Its clear tone brings death.

name: Summoning Bell
description:
An enhanced Poetic Bell.
Its elegant sound cleanses
souls before their crossing.

name: Lagia Horn I
description:
A hunting horn modeled after a
Lagiacrus. Its thunder summons
storms across the seven seas.

name: Lagia Thunderpeal
description:
A painstakingly improved Lagia
Horn. It brings rough seas as
thunder echoes across the land.

name: Onyx Choros
description:
A grotesque melody that thirsts
for potential, tormenting its host
with no coda ever to come.

name: Onyx Choros
description:
A grotesque melody that thirsts
for potential, tormenting its host
with no coda ever to come.

name: Onyx Choros
description:
A grotesque melody that thirsts
for potential, tormenting its host
with no coda ever to come.
